case_title: MAZDA AMERICAN CREDIT vs. ADELMAN, MICHAEL A. et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAZDA AMERICAN CREDIT AS TO DEFENDANT ADELMAN, MICHAEL A. DOES I THROUGH IV SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-24-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-27-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-04-1996
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-23-1996, OFF CALENDAR DUE TO DATE BEING ADVANCED PER JUDGE WICK.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-24-1996, CONTINUED TO MAY-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT: PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING CURRENT STATUS OF DEFT'S BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDING BY 5/1/96. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAZDA AMERICAN CREDIT HEARING SET FOR OCT-30-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PROOF OF SERVICE ON SUMMONS & COMPLAINT; APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION, CIVIL SUBPENA, NOTICE OF APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION, CASE QUESTIONNAIRE, CIVIL COVER SHEET, NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF; FILED BY PLAINTIFF, MAZDA AMERICAN CREDIT, ON OCTOBER 1, 1995, BY PERSONAL SERVICE, ON DEFENDANT MICHAEL A ADELMAN.
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAZDA AMERICAN CREDIT UNSERVED ON DEFENDANT ADELMAN, MICHAEL A.
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAZDA AMERICAN CREDIT
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION, CALENDAR OF OCT-30-1995, OFF CALENDAR NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
SET FOR STATUS CONFERENCE HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 BY THE COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-11-1996, CONTINUED TO MAY-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 MARCH 11, 1996 DATE IS VACATED AND REINSTATED TO ORIGINAL DATE OF 5/23/96: FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT. PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING CURRENT STATUS OF DEFT'S BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDING BY 5/1/96. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
